method.attack: Tracing the Roots diffusion-trajectory feature-packet replay

source_packet.row_contract: fixed feature tensors only; no raw CIFAR image IDs, sample IDs, target checkpoint hash, or regeneration manifest

boundary.summary: Positive Research-side feature-packet evidence, but not raw target/checkpoint/image evidence.
allowed_claims: the released supplementary feature packet replays with a non-trivial held-out MIA signal
the result is useful Research evidence for diffusion-trajectory features under gray-box/white-box access
the card can guide future non-black-box consumer-boundary design
blocked_claims: claim that DiffAudit can regenerate the released features from public raw assets

promotion_blockers: supplement ships feature tensors, not raw CIFAR image IDs or sample manifests
supplement does not identify the exact target DDPM checkpoint hash or training run identity
arXiv v3 source contains TeX, bibliography, style, and figures only; no raw provenance manifest or regeneration script
upstream train/eval scripts train and evaluate a linear classifier on feature tensors but do not generate the feature tensors from raw images and checkpoints

live_primary_source_recheck.github_repository_search: no official repository found by title or OpenReview id search; GitHub code search was rate-limited and is not used as evidence

reopen_conditions: authors publish raw target checkpoint identity plus raw member/external sample manifests
authors publish a script and public model/data asset contract that regenerates the released trajectory tensors
DiffAudit explicitly opens a non-black-box feature-packet consumer lane with separate Platform/Runtime semantics
stop_conditions: do not download raw CIFAR/CelebA-HQ/FFHQ assets, target checkpoints, or generated images from this card alone
do not expand timestep, feature-family, seed, classifier, optimizer, or regularization sweeps from this card alone
do not add Tracing the Roots to admitted-evidence-bundle.json
